title: Plumb-Rite: Winners of Best Plumbing Company 2025
description: BUSINESS NEWS - Plumb-Rite is proud to once...
bodyText: [{"type":"paragraph","text":"Sponsored Content","html":"Sponsored Content"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"BUSINESS NEWS - Plumb-Rite is proud to once again be named Best Plumbing Company in Mossel Bay.","html":"BUSINESS NEWS - Plumb-Rite is proud to once again be named Best Plumbing Company in Mossel Bay."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"Winning this award for the second year in a row is an incredible honour, and we want to thank every client and community member who supported and voted for us."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Since 2007, Plumb-Rite has specialised in professional plumbing services after our founders transitioned from the building industry.","html":"Since 2007, Plumb-Rite has specialised in professional plumbing services after our founders transitioned from the building industry."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Guided by our mission - “To provide prompt, professional plumbing services with integrity and care, building long-term relationships based on trust, quality, and exceptional service” – we have always pursued excellence in everything we do.","html":"Guided by our mission - “To provide prompt, professional plumbing services with integrity and care, building long-term relationships based on trust, quality, and exceptional service” – we have always pursued excellence in everything we do."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Our clients are the cornerstone of our success. We don’t just fix problems; we build relationships that last. That’s why our team is available 24/7, including holidays, because we understand that plumbing emergencies can happen at any time.","html":"Our clients are the cornerstone of our success. We don’t just fix problems; we build relationships that last. That’s why our team is available 24/7, including holidays, because we understand that plumbing emergencies can happen at any time."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Plumb-Rite is more than a company – we are a family. Rooted in faith, integrity and respect, we are committed to serving Mossel Bay and George with dedication and care.","html":"Plumb-Rite is more than a company – we are a family. Rooted in faith, integrity and respect, we are committed to serving Mossel Bay and George with dedication and care."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Thank you once again for trusting Plumb-Rite. Your continued support is the best seal of approval we could ever receive.","html":"Thank you once again for trusting Plumb-Rite. Your continued support is the best seal of approval we could ever receive."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"– The Plumb-Rite team","html":"– The Plumb-Rite team"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Call our 24/7 Service on: 083 484 8786 (Mossel Bay) & 082 677 1797 (George)","html":"Call our 24/7 Service on: 083 484 8786 (Mossel Bay) & 082 677 1797 (George)"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"https://www.facebook.com/profile.php?id=100065016333784","html":"https://www.facebook.com/profile.php?id=100065016333784"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’","html":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’"}]
